zh.lifeSummary: 當Ernald de Chaorces於大約0990年出生在法國時，他的父親Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon33歲，母親Ermentrude de Roucy39歲。他於1022年與Adierne de Montdoubleau在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1061年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ernald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Fernel, itself a shortened form of a derivative of Old French ferron ‘blacksmith, ironmonger’.
History: This surname was brought to North America from England. It is listed along with its original form Fernel in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Ernald de Chaorces was born about 0990, in France, his father, Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon, was 33 and his mother, Ermentrude de Roucy, was 39. He married Adierne de Montdoubleau in 1022, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1061, in Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ernald de Chaorces est né environ 0990, à France, son père, Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Roucy, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Adierne de Montdoubleau en 1022, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1061, à Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Franc: Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Ernald de Chaorces um 0990 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon 33 und seine Mutter Ermentrude de Roucy 39. Er hat 1022 in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Adierne de Montdoubleau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1061 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ernald de Chaorces è nato il circa 0990 nel Francia, il suo padre, Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ermentrude de Roucy, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Adierne de Montdoubleau nel 1022, nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1061, nel Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Franc: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스
ko.lifeSummary: Ernald de Chaorces(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermentrude de Roucy(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1022년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 Adierne de Montdoubleau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1061년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 하인스버그에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ernald de Chaorces nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em França, seu pai, Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude de Roucy, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Adierne de Montdoubleau em 1022, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1061, em Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ernald de Chaorces родился около 0990 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Roucy, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Adierne de Montdoubleau в 1022 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1061 г. в местности хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 73 лет.
